name: Neighborhood
short_description: Design a charming neighborhood, care for the unique residents it attracts, and observe a world of emergent stories come to life in this cozy, creative building game.
detailed_description:
In Neighborhood, you are the architect of a living community. Every path you lay and every home you decorate breathes life into a world that evolves with your every touch.

Shape a World That's Uniquely Yours

Your land is a canvas for your imagination. Sculpt rolling hills, trace winding roads, and place everything from cozy homes to bustling shops. Enjoy creative freedom and build an environment that is uniquely yours.

Watch a Unique Community Emerge

Your designs attract a cast of charming residents, each with their own personality and dreams. Watch as these living individuals go about their day, forming friendships, pursuing hobbies, and creating emergent stories that make your neighborhood truly one-of-a-kind.

Create the Perfect Home for Each Resident

A happy resident needs a happy home. Step inside each house and become their personal interior designer. Customize everything from wallpapers to furniture to create the perfect cozy space that reflects their unique personality. A well-designed home is the heart of a thriving community.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America
